Sixteenth Report And Account Of Trustee Of The Testamentary Trust Of The Estate Of Clare Canepa, Deceased And Petition For Approval And Allowance Of F
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Ms. Ng stated that she has nothing to add to the supplement, that this is a long-standing administration, that her Client has done everything right and that they never had any issues with her (Client) fees. The Court raised the issue of the Trustee not complying with the Court's request to provide time sheets. Ms. Ng stated that the Trustee decided not to provide time sheets and to leave it (fees) to the Court's discretion. The Court stated that some time estimates could have been provided and that going forward it will need contemporaneous time sheets. The Court also stated that it has a fiduciary duty to the trust and to the Beneficiaries, and that it requires time slips for Trustee's fees. Ms. Ng stated that she asked the Trust for time sheets and tried to convince the Trustee to do so, but that the Trustee is a school Teacher, that the Trustee is having a hard time with the COVID pandemic and that that the Trustee did not want to provide time sheets and decided not to. Ms. Ng also stated that the Trustee does not want the matter to be continued and that the Trustee wants it submitted on what has been filed. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
